headline: Quantinuum Upsizes IPO. The Year’s Biggest Quantum Offering Is Getting Even Bigger.
summary: Quantinuum is set to make the biggest trading debut for any quantum company this year.  As anticipation rises, the company is upsizing its initial public offering to as much as $1.46 billion.  Quantinuum indicated Monday that it plans to offer 26.5 million shares at prices ranging from $53 to $55 each, compared with earlier plans to sell roughly 21 million shares for $45 to $50 each.
